title: selaginella brooksii
intro: Selaginella brooksii, also known as Brooks' spikemoss, is a species of flowering plant in the Selaginellaceae family, specifically a type of spore-producing plant that belongs to the class Lycopodiopsida. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Selaginella brooksii include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against free radicals. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
